signals.name: InSAR subsidence
signals.description: Average vertical deformation rate over the last 36 days, measured from Sentinel-1 InSAR with LOS projected vertically.

signals.name: Microseismicity
signals.description: 35 microseismic events in 7 days, maximum magnitude M=2.47.

signals.name: Water infiltration
signals.description: Recent flow 523 l/h vs baseline 189 l/h.

signals.name: CO (carbon monoxide)
signals.description: Carbon monoxide in the underground atmosphere. Sources: diesel equipment and blasting. OSHA occupational limit: ~35 mg/m³ (8h).

signals.name: PM10 dust
signals.description: Suspended dust from drilling/excavation. Respirable mining dust limit: ~4-5 mg/m³.

signals.description: Average vertical deformation rate over the last 36 days, measured from Sentinel-1 InSAR with LOS projected vertically.

signals.description: No natural M≥1.5 earthquake catalogued by EMSC/USGS within a 50 km radius. Seismically inactive area; induced microseismicity below M<1.5 requires a local seismic network.

signals.name: CH4 (methane)
signals.description: Methane concentration (average 0.273%). Mining standard: 1.5% = work stoppage, 5% = lower explosive limit (LEL). Dominant risk for coal mines.

signals.name: CH4 (methane)

signals.name: InSAR subsidence
signals.description: Average vertical deformation rate over the last 36 days, measured from Sentinel-1 InSAR with LOS projected vertically.

signals.name: Microseismicity
signals.description: No natural M≥1.5 earthquake catalogued by EMSC/USGS within a 50 km radius. Seismically inactive area; induced microseismicity below M<1.5 requires a local seismic network.

signals.name: Lining convergence
signals.description: Cumulative convergence: -43.74 mm. Measured with wireless convergometers in the critical section.

signals.name: Dynamic vibrations (PGV)
signals.description: Vibrations from excavation/traffic. DIN 4150 standard for sensitive structures: 5 mm/s threshold, 20 mm/s critical.

signals.name: Wall humidity
signals.description: Average lining humidity. High values indicate active infiltration through the lining or insufficient ventilation.

signals.name: New LiDAR cracks
signals.description: Total cumulat: 14 cracks. Detected through periodic mobile LiDAR scanning.

signals.name: Tunnel water inflow
signals.description: Debit recent 30.4 l/min vs baseline 13.2 l/min. Infiltration through lining/cracks, correlated with precipitation.
